title: Wolf Armor and Storage Legacy
description: A Minecraft mod that brings wolf armor and storage capabilities to your tamed wolves, now updated for NeoForge
body:
## 🐺 Wolf Armor and Storage Legacy - NeoForge Port

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/p2Rya8Uj/images/0f0c2dcafdcd495485d9bac6f7cd43c94f53fcd7_350.webp)

This is the initial release of Wolf Armor and Storage Legacy, a complete port of the beloved 1.12.2 mod to **NeoForge**!

### ✨ Key Features

*   🛡️ **7 Wolf Armor Tiers** - Leather, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Chainmail, Copper, Netherite
*   📦 **14-Slot Wolf Storage** - Equip wolves with chests for inventory
*   🏥 **Smart Auto-Heal** - Wolves eat food from inventory when injured (combat-aware)
*   🌙 **Moon Howling** - Wolves howl at full moon during midnight with custom sounds
*   🎨 **Beautiful 3D Models** - Custom armor and chest rendering
*   ⚙️ **Fully Configurable** - Adjust settings to your liking

### 📦 Installation

1.  Install **NeoForge 21.10.47-beta** or higher
2.  Download the JAR file below
3.  Place it in your `mods` folder
4.  Launch Minecraft 1.21.10

## 🎮 Usage

### Equipping Armor
1. Tame a wolf
2. Right-click the wolf with wolf armor-item
3. The armor will be equipped and rendered on the wolf

### Adding a Chest
1. Right-click a tamed wolf with a chest-upgrade
2. The chest will be equipped (visual model appears)
3. Right-click the wolf again to open the inventory GUI

### Opening Wolf Inventory
- Shift + Right-click a wolf with a chest to access its 14-slot inventory
- The GUI shows:
  - Wolf armor slot (top)
  - 14 storage slots (2 rows × 7 columns)
  - Wolf name display

### Auto-Heal Feature
- Place food items in the wolf's chest inventory
- When the wolf is injured and not in combat, it will automatically eat food
- The wolf will continue eating until fully healed or food runs out

### Moon Howling
- Wolves will automatically howl at full moons around midnight
- The wolf sits and looks up during the howl (3 seconds)
- Only occurs between 20:00 and 24:00 in-game time
- Can be interrupted by combat

### 🙏 Credits

Original mod by **[saturniidae](https://github.com/satyrnidae/wolf-armor-and-storage-legacy)** (1.12.2)  
Ported to NeoForge 1.21.10 by **[Smallinger](https://github.com/Smallinger/wolf-armor-and-storage-legacy)**

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/Smallinger/wolf-armor-and-storage-legacy/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for full details!
